name: Spicy Apple Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, cinnamon, ginger, allspice, nutmeg, and walnuts.
2. In another bowl, blend the oil, honey, eggs, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients. Mix only until just moistened.
4. Gently fold in the grated apple.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled 9x5 loaf pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
